channel.title: Comments on: Alaskan Brewing Company – Alaskan White, Ep. 97
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Bryan
item.dc:creator: Bryan
item.description: Just had the White here in Tucson...great beer, so easy to drink and I love the subtle sweetness it has to it.
item.content:encoded: Just had the White here in Tucson…great beer, so easy to drink and I love the subtle sweetness it has to it.
